---
description: "Use when editing or creating JavaScript code snippets for slide embedding. Covers region markers, import style, and brevity."
applyTo: "snippets/**"
---

# Snippet Guidelines

- Vanilla JavaScript with ES module imports
- Wrap embeddable sections in `// #region <name>` / `// #endregion <name>`
- Keep snippets short — they are displayed on slides at limited screen size
- Use descriptive variable names that read well without surrounding context
